valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 13 Jul 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 14 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High Fair Isle 1032, slow moving, declining 1031 by midday tomorrow. Low FitzRoy 1012 expected 100 miles west of FitzRoy with little change by same time
